[[File:Plague Numbers.svg|thumb|Plague numbers]]
The nine plagues are the nine problems that haunt all [[sapient]] beings. 

They are countered by the [[Ninefold Vaccine]]

The state of being plagued by them is called [[ignobility]] and the state of freedom from them is [[nobility]]. The difference between a [[kami]] and an [[archon]] is that an archon is plagued by the nine plagues and a kami is liberated, or in other words a kami is in a state of nobility and an archon is in a state of ignobility 
== Nine Plagues ==
This model is based on [[alo]] and designed for better memorability, alongside elaborating on [[Enstuckment|Entrapment]]

=== α [[Domicide]] ===
αα [[Alienation]]

αλ [[Angst]]

αω [[Absurdity]]

=== λ [[Foolishness]] ===
λα [[Forgetting]]

λλ [[Spiralling]]

λω [[Drowning]] 

=== ω [[Enstuckment|Entrapment]] ===
ωα [[Locking]]

ωλ [[Ego enstuckment|Ego Entrapment]]

ωω [[Limitation]]

== History ==

=== Prehistory ===
Study of the nine plagues has a large history dating back to antiquity, however they were rarely formulated together systematically until John Vervaeke

[[Domicide]] was addressed by hellenistic philosophers, in particular [[stoicism]]

[[Angst]] has not had a good addressing in western culture but St Paul and Augustine and Martin Luther all suffered greatly from it

[[Alienation]] has had numerous attempts to address it and does not have a specific philosopher who had the most influence on it

[[Absurdity]] was addressed prominently by [[spinoza]], and has prominently affected [[Renee descates]]

[[foolishness]] was addressed by the classical philosophers

[[Forgetting]] was first addressed by Erich Fromm in his book ''To Have or to Be? and had influence from [[Heidegger]]''

[[Spiralling]] has Buddhist elements but was first formally addressed in its current form by Marc Lewis 


[[Enstuckment|Entrapment]] was addressed prominently in [[gnosticism]]

John Kekes uses the term "perrenial problems" here and although he is cited by Vervaeke as a source, it is unclear what the influence he had on this was<ref>https://archive.philosophersmag.com/perennial-philosophical-problems/</ref>

=== Formulation ===
The nine plagues were first formulated as the seven perrenial problems by [[John Vervaeke]] in 2019.<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDwvHKJJjIQ&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=45</ref>

In October [[2022]] [[Immanuelle]] expanded [[enstuckment|Entrapment]] into its own category of plagues to work with the recently developed [[one prime rule]], and because of an observation that Entrapment was broad on par with [[foolishness]] and [[domicide]] rather than narrow like individual plagues within the categories such as [[alienation]] or [[forgetting]]. 

In the video itself John Vervaeke divides existential entrapment into two subtypes, and then proposes the same solution to each part<ref name=":0" />. [[Empathic enstuckment|Existential ignorance]] and [[Ego enstuckment|existential inertia]], so the main element added was [[Foreign enstuckment|Foreign Entrapment]] which was something Immanuelle added from their personal experience.

The [[new plagues]] Entrapment was divided into are ones more influenced by the thought of [[Alok Kanojia]] than John Vervaeke. 

As of October 10 2022 no distinct booster shots have been proposed to deal with the new plagues

== Original seven plagues ==
Originally there were seven plagues. This comes from the work of [[John Vervaeke]].<ref name=":0" />
# [[Spiralling]]	
# [[Forgetting]]
# [[Drowning]]
# [[Absurdity]]
# [[Angst]]
# [[Alienation]]
# [[Enstuckment|Entrapment]]

=== Divisions of the original Seven plagues ===
They are sometimes divided into the plagues of [[foolishness]] which were most prominent in classical civilization and of which Buddhism and Taoism deal best with

*[[Spiralling]]	
* [[Forgetting]]
* [[Drowning]]

The plagues of [[domicide]] which were more present in the Hellenistic period, and of which Stoicism primarily deals with

*[[Absurdity]]
* [[Angst]]
* [[Alienation]]

And the gnostic plague of [[Existential Entrapment]] which was most prominently addressed by the gnostics. This one was later expanded into the [[New plagues]].

* [[Enstuckment|Entrapment]]

== References ==
[[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Nine Plagues]][[sn:Nine Plagues]][[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Nine Plagues]][[Category:Shuttering]]
[[Category:Ecology of Practices]]
[[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[sn:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Pages]]
